sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55689" key="kate/aga" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατέᾱγα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατεάγην</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατέαξα</orth>, <sense id="n55689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατάγνυμι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
